report.summary: No new commits since 9cc38d1. Stabilization hold — middleware SEO blocker (58/1324 indexable) and 111 orphaned slugs remain top carry-overs. All 6 API routes present, /defi-yields still lacks cache/fallback. 10 uncommitted OG SVGs ready.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TypeScript errors: 40, all in structured-data.examples.ts (unchanged). No new regressions introduced.

6 recently touched learn pages verified: crypto-arbitrage, DVT, Lido V3, MiCA, RWA-yield, Sui-Hashi — all have valid metadata exports, Article+FAQ structured data schemas, proper imports. Production-ready.
Page audit: 1,252 page.tsx on disk vs 1,324 published slugs — 111 orphaned slugs (correction from prior ~72 estimate). Concentrated in blog/* (9), courses/* (5), compare/*, investing/best/*.
Build cannot be verified locally (sandbox memory limit at 7GB). Vercel build last confirmed at 3m 35s on 9cc38d1.
10 new uncommitted OG SVG images in public/ — staking, drift-hack, flash-loans, focil, hyperliquid, impermanent-loss, liquid-staking, restaking, stablecoin-payments, stablecoins-explained.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: /api/prices (CoinGecko): HEALTHY — 60s in-memory cache, 120s stale, Cache-Control + X-Cache-Source.
/api/trending (CoinGecko): HEALTHY — 300s cache, 600s stale, proper headers.
/api/fear-greed: HEALTHY — 600s cache, 1200s stale, proper fallback.
/api/market-metrics: BEST — 60s cache, hardcoded mock fallback, X-Cache-Source HIT/MISS.
/api/market-dominance: HEALTHY — 300s cache, dual fallback (stale + simulated data).
/api/defi-yields: AT RISK — no in-memory cache, no fallback data, relies only on HTTP cache headers. Will 500 on upstream failure.
Rate limiter (src/lib/rate-limiter.ts) exists but wired into 0 of 6 public API routes. All routes unprotected.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deploy: 9cc38d1 on Vercel (deployment 48cR1QbfG). No new deploys this cycle — stabilization hold.
CRITICAL SEO BLOCKER: Middleware hardcodes 58 pillar pages for indexing. 1,266 published pages (96%) receive 'noindex, follow' — Google will not index them despite being in PUBLISHED_PAGES.
Uncommitted changes in working tree: 10 new OG SVGs, 2 modified client components (MarketRecapClient, WhaleTrackerClient), report files. Need commit+deploy.
Security headers: properly configured (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy).
Cache strategy: pillar pages 1hr/1d/7d, non-pillar 30m/12hr/1d — healthy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: No new commits this cycle. All 8 commits today were pre-cycle (build fixes, full 1324-page publish, JSX fixes, memory optimization).
CARRY-OVER (P0): Fix middleware to sync indexing with PUBLISHED_PAGES — actively blocking SEO for 96% of site. NEEDS JEFE decision: auto-sync vs remove gating.
CARRY-OVER (P1): Scaffold 111 remaining orphaned slugs (published but no page.tsx). Risk: 404s for indexed URLs.
CARRY-OVER (P1): Add in-memory cache + fallback to /api/defi-yields.
CARRY-OVER (P2): Wire rate limiter into all 6 API routes.
CARRY-OVER (P2): Clean 40 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts.
CARRY-OVER (P3): Commit+deploy 10 OG SVGs and 2 component updates.
